name: Carrot Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together.
2. Fill pudding mold 2/3 full and steam for 3-4 hours.
3. Serve with hard sauce.
Hard Sauce:
1. Cream the butter until very soft.
2. Stir in the sugar and vanilla.
3. Store in a cool place until ready for use.
4. Additional sugar, cream or milk may be added to adjust consistency.
This sauce can be used with any hot pudding.
